'''Fiery Ones''' were mysterious [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] photonic beings indigenous to [[Kathol (planet)|Kathol]]. Unlike most of the [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] inhabitants, they were apparently not creations of the [[DarkStryder]]. In appearance, they looked like balls of light. Communicating through incredibly powerful [[Telepathy/Legends|telepathy]], they could use the [[Ta-Ree]] energy that came from the planet, and could use it as a weapon if needed.

==Appearances==
*{{DarkStryder|adventure=Endgame (adventure)|book=Endgame|reprint=yes}} {{1st}}
